reviews.comment:
Todo muy bien, muy buena atención del personal. Esta YPF cuenta con máquina para inflar las ruedas. Los baños no están tan limpios y son chicos.

(Translated by Google)
Everything was great, the staff was very helpful. This YPF station has a tire inflator. The restrooms aren't very clean and are small.

reviews.comment:

reviews.comment:
Cómo siempre el lugar está lleno, la playa es muy pequeña para la cantidad de gente que recibe la comuna en temporada esto entorpece el tránsito de los locales

(Translated by Google)
As always, the place is packed. The beach is too small for the number of people the town receives during the season, which hinders the movement of locals.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1981887218224238304/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNoNGR1ZVpREAE

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
Good place, but there is always a lack of water for the bathrooms.
